summary: VERIFIED 12/12 Stage 4-6 critical fixes. All fixes properly implemented and working.

tests: FIX-1: Profile update sets updated_at - PASS (username change persisted)
FIX-2a: Username validation rejects 2-char username - PASS (400/422 returned)
FIX-2b: Username validation accepts valid username - PASS (200 returned)
FIX-3a: Admin can POST /api/admin/questions - PASS (201 created)
FIX-3b: Non-admin POST /api/admin/questions returns 403 - PASS (Admin access required)
FIX-4: Non-admin can GET /api/admin/questions - PASS (200 with questions list)
FIX-5: Match status upcoming->live transition works - PASS
FIX-6: Terminal state (completed) blocked from transitions - PASS (400 Invalid transition)
FIX-7: Wallet balance has last_claimed field - PASS
FIX-8: Daily reward creates transaction with reason=daily_reward, type=credit - PASS
FIX-9: Double daily claim returns error - PASS (400 DAILY_ALREADY_CLAIMED)
FIX-10: Profile has rank_title, total_points, matches_played, contests_won, referral_code, daily_streak - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: AdminUser dependency correctly applied to write operations (POST, PUT, DELETE) in admin.py
CurrentUser dependency used for read operations (GET) allowing non-admin access
VALID_TRANSITIONS map in matches.py correctly blocks terminal states (completed, cancelled, abandoned)
Username validation in user_service.py enforces 3-20 character limit
Wallet balance response includes last_claimed field from user.last_daily_claim
Daily reward claim creates proper transaction with TransactionType.CREDIT and TransactionReason.DAILY_REWARD
Double claim protection via _can_claim_daily() checking last_daily_claim date
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 4-6 fixes verified. Admin guard (AdminUser dependency) works correctly - non-admin gets 403 on write ops but can read. Match status transitions validated - terminal states blocked. Profile and wallet endpoints return all required fields. Daily reward claim creates proper transaction records.

verification_details.FIX-1_ProfileUpdatedAt: Profile update with username change persists correctly. updated_at set in service layer.
verification_details.FIX-2_UsernameValidation: Username 'ab' (2 chars) rejected with 400. 'ValidName123' accepted with 200.
verification_details.FIX-3_AdminGuard: AdminUser dependency on POST/PUT/DELETE in admin.py. Non-admin gets 403 'Admin access required'.
verification_details.FIX-4_NonAdminRead: CurrentUser dependency on GET endpoints. Non-admin can read questions list.
verification_details.FIX-5_StatusTransition: VALID_TRANSITIONS map allows upcoming->live. Transition successful.
verification_details.FIX-6_TerminalState: completed has empty allowed transitions []. Attempting completed->upcoming returns 400.
verification_details.FIX-7_LastClaimed: Wallet balance response includes last_claimed field (null if never claimed, ISO string if claimed).
verification_details.FIX-8_DailyTransaction: Daily reward creates transaction with reason='daily_reward' and type='credit'.
verification_details.FIX-9_DoubleClaim: Second claim same day returns 400 with code DAILY_ALREADY_CLAIMED.
verification_details.FIX-10_ProfileFields: Profile response includes: rank_title, total_points, matches_played, contests_won, referral_code, daily_streak.
